title: 'Project Firepower': Inside Rheinmetall's gunpowder expansion as Europe races to replenish its ammunition
summary_full: Scarcity of gunpowder is seen as a choke point for ramping up production of ammunition for militaries, and a barrier for Europe to ensure defense sovereignty
summary_public: Scarcity of gunpowder is seen as a choke point for ramping up production of ammunition for militaries, and a barrier for Europe to ensure defense sovereignty
